name: Kitchen Rush
desc: Cook delicious dishes, serve hungry customers, and manage your restaurant across 30 challenging levels in 5 unique kitchens! Upgrade stations and master burgers, pizza, sushi and more!

name: Tiny Fishing
desc: Cast your hook and catch rare fish in this addictive idle fishing game! Upgrade your rod, line, and bait to explore deeper ocean zones. 30 fish species across 5 depth zones, from Shore to the Abyss.

name: Antistress
desc: Play relaxing fidget toys and ASMR games online free. 15+ satisfying interactive toys including bubble wrap, Newtons cradle, slime, and more.
